subcodes.first_line: Verily, Justice declareth: "Thy letter hath come into the presence of the Wronged One," and Bounty calleth out, saying: "O Lord of the world!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان العدل یقول ما حضر کتابک لدی المظلوم و الفضل ینادی و یقول یا مولی العالم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual transformation, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @knowledge; recognition of God
